subject: refactor(hygiene): extract utilities, remove dead code, reduce file sizes
body:
- Extract fetchWithTimeout utility (src/utils/fetchWithTimeout.ts) to
  deduplicate 6 AbortController+setTimeout occurrences
- Extract diagnostic checks into src/utils/diagnostics.ts (12 pure functions
  + shared diagnoseFailure) from DebugBanner and InterestForm
- DebugBanner: 582→355 lines, runDiagnostics: 277→50 lines
- InterestForm: 507→433 lines, removed local diagnoseFailure (now shared)
- Remove unused avatarInitials field from PersonalInfo interface, cvData, tests
- Correct test count in HISTORY.md (grep overcounted, actual: 108)

Tags: refactor, hygiene, deduplication, dead-code
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch
